headline: Does Kinross Gold’s (TSX:K) Massive Buyback Plan Reveal a New Capital-Return Playbook?
summary: In March 2026, Kinross Gold Corporation announced a normal course issuer bid to repurchase up to 104,239,211 common shares, or 8.7% of its issued share capital, by March 23, 2027, with all repurchased shares to be cancelled to enhance shareholder returns and use available funds. This sizeable buyback authorization, alongside recent positive analyst views, underscores management’s confidence in Kinross’s balance sheet strength and future cash-generation capacity. We’ll now examine how this...
